text: The quiet, sterile hallway outside contrasts sharply with the vibrant, stimulating visuals inside the R+D space. I feel a subtle sense of anticipation crossing from one world to another: from the impersonal vacancy of glass and white walls to this domain of research and collective curiosity. Immersed in the illuminated words and images, I feel a contemplative joy, as if invited to both observe and participate in a bigger intellectual dance—reminded of how spaces reshape my thoughts and presence.
